function.name: _bpmn_create_instance
function.description: Create and start a workflow process instance. ⚠️ Step 1: Call _bpmn_process_define_list to get the workflow definition ID; Step 2: Call _bpmn_get_process_define to get the workflow definition details, then construct the request parameters according to the returned configuration.

processDefineId.description: The workflow process definition ID. It must be obtained from the processDefine.id returned by calling _bpmn_query_process_define_list. Note this is not the procDefId field returned from instance list.

record.description: Form data. Required if startSetting.enableStartForm is true. Key-value pairs format, and the key should be the field object's key, not the field id. When startSetting.enableStartForm is true, only fields with visible=true and editable=true in the tableFieldSettingList of the bpmnStartSetting object returned by _bpmn_get_process_define can be filled in.

varMap.description: Input variables for the process instance, key-value pairs format, optional.
